name: Scrambled Eggs
allIngredients:
"3 large eggs",
      "1 tbsp butter",
      "2 tbsp milk",
      "Salt and black pepper",
      "Fresh chives to garnish"
instructions:
"Crack eggs into a bowl with milk and a pinch of salt. Whisk until fully combined and smooth.",
      "Melt butter in a non-stick pan over the lowest heat � patience makes perfect scrambled eggs.",
      "Pour in eggs. Using a silicone spatula, gently push curds from edges toward the centre in slow sweeping motions.",
      "Remove from heat while eggs still look slightly underdone � residual heat finishes them perfectly.",
      "Season with black pepper, garnish with chives, and serve immediately on warm toast.

name: French Toast
allIngredients:
"2 thick slices of bread (brioche is ideal)",
      "2 eggs",
      "60ml milk",
      "1 tbsp butter",
      "1 tsp sugar",
      "� tsp ground cinnamon",
      "Powdered sugar to serve"
instructions:
"Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon together in a wide shallow bowl until combined.",
      "Soak each bread slice for 30 seconds per side, pressing gently so the custard absorbs fully.",
      "Melt butter in a pan over medium heat until foaming subsides.",
      "Cook the soaked bread 2�3 minutes per side until deeply golden.",
      "Dust with powdered sugar and serve warm with maple syrup or fresh fruit."
